summary: Well-executed negative-result paper with three clear mechanistic insights. Iteration 2 resolves the numerical inconsistency (CIFAR-100 numbers now consistent) and strengthens budget equivalence with random-schedule robustness verification. Paper is publication-ready for NeurIPS with minor camera-ready revisions (multi-seed CIs, 200-epoch figures).
strengths: Three mechanistic insights cleanly separated, each with dedicated experimental evidence
Decoupling ablation provides unambiguous single-seed result (92% to 10% collapse)
Budget equivalence now verified through both constant-matching and random-schedule experiments
CIFAR-100 asymmetry explained with falsifiable prediction
Honest scope limitation disclosure with concrete future directions
weaknesses: Single seed for main comparisons (camera-ready commitment with multi-seed in progress)
Figures show 20-epoch pilot (tables have full 200-epoch results)

issues.description: Multi-seed results with 95% CI needed for camera-ready version
200-epoch training curves would improve visual evidence quality
